summary: Retest of 2 targeted fixes after iteration_8 on https://eval-probability.preview.emergentagent.com. BOTH FIXES PASS. (1) chamber_missing ignite-hint: with no firm selected, tab-strategy renders [data-testid='strategy-empty'] which now contains both [data-testid='ignite-hint'] (text: '※first select a firm and an account in the chamber tab→ CHAMBER') and a working [data-testid='ignite-hint-link'] — clicking it switches to pane-chamber correctly. (2) BootstrapInput live-parse: after switching to mode-bootstrap and typing 10 numeric lines into bootstrap-textarea WITHOUT clicking bootstrap-parse, the ignite-hint immediately reads the bootstrap_too_few variant '⚠need at least 30 values · you have 10' with live count = 10, confirming the textarea onChange now calls parse(e.target.value). Bootstrap-summary panel also renders live (total days: 10, WR 50%, etc), proving strategy.bootstrapData and strategy.bootstrapStats update on every keystroke. Zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: App.js still contains a duplicate chamber_missing branch inside the IIFE (lines 430-449) that is unreachable because that IIFE only runs when planDraft is truthy. It is harmless (the new strategy-empty hint covers the case) but could be cleaned up for clarity.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iteration_8 open bugs are resolved: (a) strategy-empty panel now embeds ignite-hint + ignite-hint-link (App.js ~line 355-366); (b) BootstrapInput textarea onChange calls parse() live so strategy.bootstrapData updates on every keystroke (StrategySections.jsx line 109). Verified via Playwright on public URL.
